255578ff.value: I want this to be a monorepo that will re-use as much of the code base as possible to create apps for different brands. they will all follow the same overall layout and UX, but will have different designs as each brand sees fit. Please set up that based on the file structure shown in example-tree, but for now only do what is necessary to get a basic MVP working

a122e99f.value: okay this is looking good. Can you change the home page to look like an ecommerce site, with a couple of dummy product tiles, a search bar, and a top menu bar. the components don't need to go anywhere though. Please set it up so that BrandA and BrandB have different top menu options to showcase the flexibility of the mono-repo. Use good design principles that maximize code reuse and generic components that are then customized by each brand

a8991331.value: can you make it so each brand has different products?
